6:
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND rn = 1) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'LAM' AND rn = 1) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'LAM' AND rn = 1) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'KAM' AND rn = 1) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'KAM' AND rn = 1) -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM ranked WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND rn = 1) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment ORDER BY SUM(ym.Consumption) ASC, AVG(ym.Consumption) ASC) AS rn
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
) AS ranked;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment, pct_inc
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           ( (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption END) -
              SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END))
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END),0) ) * 100.0
           AS pct_inc
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) pct
WHERE pct_inc = (SELECT MAX(pct_inc) FROM pct)
   OR pct_inc = (SELECT MIN(pct_inc) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    ORDER BY ds.points DESC
    LIMIT 1

champ_time AS (
    SELECT r.milliseconds AS champ_ms
    FROM results r
    JOIN target_race tr ON r.raceId = tr.raceId
    JOIN champion c ON r.driverId = c.driverId

    WHERE r.position = (
        SELECT MAX(position)
        FROM results
        WHERE raceId = tr.raceId
    )
)

        ELSE (sum_1997 - sum_1996) * 1.0 / sum_1996
    END AS growth_rate
FROM (
